verdict_rationale: All static-inspection checks against ledger-v1 assumptions, IP resolutions, and OOS list confirmed. All 28 edge_case_testing + cv_artifact_exercise + prompt_named_verb assertions pass under production fidelity, verified by an independent re-run of S6's harness against the integrated bundle. PNV.1 (verb='display') passes with a captured setFeedback frame carrying {title: 'Bohemian Rhapsody', artist: 'Queen'} addressed to the willAppear'd context.

inputs_read.sections_spec: decisions/technical-discovery/sections-v2.json (live spec; v1 superseded by metadata-only covers-field amendment)
inputs_read.amendments: none beyond the v1->v2 covers-field amendment, which is metadata-only and required no rebuild

static_inspection_pass.summary: All 13 Discovery assumptions honored in the integrated artifact; all 10 OOS items absent; all 3 inflection point default branches implemented.

assumption_checks.evidence: manifest.json is SDK-v2 .sdPlugin folder at reverse-DNS com.autobuilder.applemusic-nowplaying.sdPlugin/; plugin uses Node + vendored ws@8.20.1 for WebSocket transport
manifest.Actions[0].Controllers === ['Encoder'] with custom layout layouts/nowplaying.json; not a Keypad single-tile action
music_source.js queries local Apple Music.app via osascript; no remote / web / cloud paths anywhere
manifest.OS = [{Platform: 'mac', MinimumVersion: '11.0'}], single-entry; CodePathMac present, no CodePath/CodePathWin
Layout JSON declares two text items keyed 'title' and 'artist'; sendFeedback emits both fields; track-change refresh proven by DCA.A5.2 (two back-to-back fixtures yield distinct frames)
main.js sets DEFAULT_POLL_MS=2000 and uses setInterval; DCA.A6.1 captures ~5 frames over 2.2s @ 500ms cadence
When fixture is empty (paused/stopped), sendFeedback emits {title:'Apple Music', artist:''} — DCA.A7.1 captured frame
Layout JSON declares text-overflow: 'ellipsis' on both items; grep of plugin/ for 'marquee'/'scrollOffset' returns zero matches
No auth, account, cloud sync, persisted state, or telemetry code in plugin/; grep for fetch/non-localhost https returns zero matches
Bundle is a .sdPlugin folder with manifest.json (valid JSON), plugin/run.sh entrypoint, layouts/nowplaying.json, ui/inspector.html, icons/, and vendored node_modules/ws — installable by drop-in
inspector.html declares exactly 3 input controls (pollIntervalMs, placeholder, showArtist), matching DCA.A11.1's at-most-3 ceiling
Layout JSON contains only text items; no pixmap/image/artwork; no setImage call carrying art data
sdk.js handles touchTap/dialRotate/dialDown/dialUp by emitting only logMessage; AA.S3.3 and DCA.A13.1 confirm no action-effect frames after input events

oos_checks.evidence: grep of plugin/ for 'spotify' case-insensitive: zero matches
no such code in plugin/; layout has only title+artist text items
no pixmap/image/artwork in layout; no setImage in main.js or sdk.js
sdk.js's touchTap/dialRotate/dialDown/dialUp handlers only emit logMessage; no transport control wiring

oos_checks.topic: Mobile / iOS / iPhone / iPad data source
oos_checks.evidence: grep of plugin/ for 'ios'/'iphone'/'ipad': zero matches
no fetch/http to non-localhost; no telemetry/analytics references
PI has only 3 functional inputs; no font/theme controls
manifest declares one Encoder action for the wide-display touchbar; no other hardware paths
PI is English-only; no i18n strings file

inflection_point_resolutions.evidence: touch/dial events ignored; only logMessage emitted; DCA.IP3.DISPLAY.1 captured action-effect frame count=1 (the immediate willAppear paint only)

artifact_exercise_results.scenario: Run PNV.1 verbatim against the integrated bundle; capture WebSocket frames
artifact_exercise_results.environment: Production-fidelity: spawned output/integration/com.autobuilder.applemusic-nowplaying.sdPlugin/plugin/run.sh as a child process with the four SDK CLI args (-port, -pluginUUID, -registerEvent, -info); connected via real ws@8.20.1 (the bundle's own vendored copy) WebSocket server on free port at 127.0.0.1; AppleScript source replaced by MUSIC_SOURCE_FIXTURE env-var as the only stub (unavoidable in non-device environment per TD's PNV scenario). manifest.json, main.js, sdk.js, music_source.js, layouts/nowplaying.json are all the actual integrated files.
artifact_exercise_results.independent_rerun: CV re-ran S6's harness via `node harness.js` from the harness directory; output matched S6's report 28/28; PNV frame captured identically.

prompt_named_verb_result.scenario: Run the integrated .sdPlugin bundle's CodePathMac entrypoint as a child process with the four SDK CLI args (-port, -pluginUUID, -registerEvent, -info) pointed at a fake WebSocket host on 127.0.0.1. The fake host: (a) accepts the plugin's registerPlugin handshake, (b) sends a willAppear event for the wide-display action, (c) simulates the AppleScript data source by replacing the music_source module via a child-process shim that returns 'Bohemian Rhapsody\tQueen' on stdout. Within 3 seconds of willAppear, capture every WebSocket frame the plugin sends.
prompt_named_verb_result.expected_result: At least one frame is a JSON message whose event field equals 'setFeedback' and whose payload contains both 'Bohemian Rhapsody' (in the 'title' field) and 'Queen' (in the 'artist' field), addressed to the willAppear'd action context.
prompt_named_verb_result.environment: production-fidelity (real plugin process spawned via run.sh -> /usr/bin/env node main.js, real vendored ws@8.20.1 library, fake SDK host bound to 127.0.0.1 on a free port using WebSocket.Server, AppleScript shimmed via MUSIC_SOURCE_FIXTURE env-var injected into the spawned child's environment — the only stub, unavoidable in a non-device verification environment)
prompt_named_verb_result.interpretation: The integrated plugin DISPLAYS the currently playing song and artist on the wide-display surface under production-fidelity rules. The setFeedback frame is the SDK-canonical paint operation for an Encoder-controller layout with the custom layouts/nowplaying.json which declares title and artist text items — by SDK contract, the host renders this payload's title and artist values into the wide-strip layout. The verb 'display' is therefore exercised end-to-end.

edge_case_testing_review.production_fidelity_evidence: harness.js spawns /bin/sh against the bundle's plugin/run.sh — exercising the real CodePathMac shell entrypoint; requires the bundle's own vendored ws under plugin/node_modules/ws (line 26: `require(path.join(BUNDLE_DIR, 'plugin', 'node_modules', 'ws'))`); spawns a real WebSocket.Server on 127.0.0.1; the only stub is MUSIC_SOURCE_FIXTURE env-var (read by music_source.js's built-in test-affordance branch at line 47 of music_source.js) — which is the AppleScript boundary substitution explicitly permitted by PNV.1's scenario. No other plugin/ source is patched or imported by the harness.

verifier_coverage.plus_pnv: PNV.1 also exercised by the same harness as the headline scenario

independent_rerun.method: CV invoked `node harness.js` in the harness directory via the workspace bash tool; harness wrote a fresh report.json; output matched the existing report verbatim
independent_rerun.result: 28/28 passed, identical to S6's recorded report

critic_final_sweep_review.status: clean per briefing; no findings to relitigate

no image/pixmap/artwork in layout; no setImage in plugin source
grep for 'spotify' case-insensitive: 0 matches
grep for 'ios'/'iphone'/'ipad' case-insensitive: 0 matches

harness scenario manifest covers every edge_case_testing assertion id from sections-v2.json (cross-referenced; difference empty)

harness reads plugin/ files via fs.readFileSync for static-grep only; the only require() into plugin/ is the music_source.js in-process behavior test (which exercises the public exported getNowPlaying via MUSIC_SOURCE_FIXTURE — not a patch or shim); no monkey-patches of main.js or sdk.js
harness writes report.json with one record per assertion id, status in {passed, failed, skipped}

sdk.js sendFeedback emits event='setFeedback'; no setImage path for now-playing payloads
layouts/nowplaying.json items has key=='title' and key=='artist'
run.sh: `exec /usr/bin/env node "$(dirname "$0")/main.js" "$@"`
plugin/node_modules/ws/package.json has name=='ws' (version 8.20.1)
music_source.js requires child_process and uses execFile with 'osascript'; parseOutput splits on tab and returns {title, artist} or null
music_source.js APPLESCRIPT string contains all four literals
main.js: const DEFAULT_POLL_MS = 2000
no occurrence of marquee/scrollOffset in main.js or sdk.js; truncation is layout-native

summary: All gates passed. The integrated artifact at output/integration/com.autobuilder.applemusic-nowplaying.sdPlugin/ honors every Discovery assumption, implements every IP default branch, omits every OOS item, and exercises every machine-checkable, edge_case_testing, cv_artifact_exercise, and prompt_named_verb assertion under production fidelity. PNV.1 (verb='display') passes with captured evidence. Verdict: pass.
